message: ci: refresh state before sweep publish commits

files.patch:
@@ -437,7 +437,11 @@ jobs:
             --run-url "https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
 
       - name: Commit dashboard and review files
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.OPENCLAW_GH_TOKEN || github.token }}
         run: |
+          npm run reconcile
+          npm run dashboard
           git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
           git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
           git add README.md items closed
